summary: Reframed the opening so Chapter 12 enters through Fasa's internal count of the six connections before turning to the flood, which separates its scaffold from Chapter 13's weather-and-observation opening while preserving the same chapter facts and pressure. The exit already handed cleanly into the next morning's communal setting, so it was left intact.
edits: Rewrote the opening construction to begin with Fasa counting the six cross-family connections.
Kept the flood-status, Leos-untouched setup, and mid-afternoon compound beat in place after the new opening turn.
Verified Chapter 12 does not contain verbatim style-bible example lines.
